name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: My Statement on the status of the Election
body:
My Statement on the status of the Election | | | |
---
| My statement on the status of the Election
---
| | |
---
| **I believe that the American people deserve transparency, honesty, and an accurate counting of votes in this and all elections. I believe in equal justice under the law, and this is what Americans deserve. Period. Every vote legally cast must be counted, and any vote illegally cast must be thrown out. Even a slim possibility of election inaccuracy, or even fraudulent ballots should never occur in this great nation. I support every endeavor that seeks to legally obtain an accurate counting of all legal votes, no matter the final outcome. ** **Please join with me in prayer to pray for integrity in this election, and for an accurate counting of all legal votes until this election is fully and completely resolved.** **Let’s pray!** **God bless you, & God bless America. **

**#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=b6d018cb15&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=062f5d33d7&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Patience is a Virtue!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , This has certainly been one of the most eventful elections in recent history. I could not be more proud of the campaign we ran here in Pennsylvania. We have reached out and engaged with voters across the Commonwealth and, most importantly, we've listened. We've heard your calls for greater transparency and accountability, principles that have been the cornerstone of our campaign. There is nothing more important in our system of government than the integrity of our election system, and that starts with ensuring that all legitimate votes are counted. We had this experience during our hard fought primary. It was true then... and it's even more true now. While some are rushing to bypass the checks and balances and prematurely claim victory, I ask that all of you join me in being patient and letting the system play out as it is intended. The will of the people - all the people - must be heard and every vote must be counted, even if it takes a little longer. As always, I am humbled by your support of my candidacy and I look forward to updating you when we have more information. Stay tuned, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Be5r0de97doWqmRXu6CNiBj5QDeZ5gkSy_u_QRRO0Po=/_xn1fomkKaOz3FTp3cFFw90WsCy1iNL4wugVY98rTMk=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Be5r0de97doWqmRXu6CNiBj5QDeZ5gkSy_u_QRRO0Po=/WYxtwAi8yz65htq-KffyaLr5_YVjPscCSTDRRLRMPGU=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Be5r0de97doWqmRXu6CNiBj5QDeZ5gkSy_u_QRRO0Po=/gpUpn1zk4n5921rITGXxpGGAaiiFBN00-R6gmjBO09c=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Be5r0de97doWqmRXu6CNiBj5QDeZ5gkSy_u_QRRO0Po=/7wXPWWLYx4_3w8A4ezi5mQPaZiyU98SfiENWzlNW60s=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Be5r0de97doWqmRXu6CNiBj5QDeZ5gkSy_u_QRRO0Po=/UpZEH4jMLlYTknUBgugk9qBOx5yUIsg-GXDdomIwWdw=?hl=en)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Election could be called for Biden any day, but we still must fight for President Trump
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20311-9e4974abe7c04b4eace8283072afce84/75/144/5302c2f7-b514-4727-b9e3-98ca0fec1517)** | |
---
As Election Day came and went, two things quickly became clear.

First, that a winner was not going to be declared in the early hours following Election Day, as it is normally.

Second, that the election manipulation by Democrats happening before our very eyes was unprecedented.

So, with the Presidency hanging in the balance, we decided to take immediate, necessary action, rallying freedom-loving Americans in all key swing states. We intend to send a clear message to those in power: we will protect the vote and stop Democrats from stealing this election.

In concert with many other conservative organizations including FreedomWorks, Act! For America, Turning Point Action and many others, we are working to Protect the Vote.

**[Find out more about future rallies in your city](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=_9VtnaE6K2wW9ilVrKCG7Q)** **(more added each day).**
[FIND RALLIES ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdC10aGUtdm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTM4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=GSEIXMRQCvuecV3AMgcfTg)
For immediate updates, make sure to [follow our verified Twitter account](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzP21pZD00MjkzOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=PUs67hQRFxz-hCWd-sDYcw).
**Would you be interested in[attending or organizing a rally](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZnNXNWtWdVZiRVZwOS1ISGlWSXJreGZHYlNSOFVzSlR4UGJyVDVKdHEzOVVmdnZnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MjkzOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=hxLbnyI7UvJnFCc00W9Dbg)? **
[ORGANIZE A RALLY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZnNXNWtWdVZiRVZwOS1ISGlWSXJreGZHYlNSOFVzSlR4UGJyVDVKdHEzOVVmdnZnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MjkzOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Ons9PhDOWh5tB_TP2QJkww)

**[Report: Big Tech Has Censored Half of Trump’s Social Media Posts Since Election Day](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%&K=v6b5vunYS03v57TXjFOQwA)**
Half of President Donald Trump’s posts on Facebook and Twitter have been censored by Big Tech giants in the wake of Tuesday’s still-contested election. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzExLTllNDk3NGFiZTdjMDRiNGVhY2U4MjgzMDcyYWZjZTg0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%&K=TA-GVQ-quQzEWRjc_gfyBA)**

clean_body: | | As Election Day came and went, two things quickly became clear. First, that a winner was not going to be declared in the early hours following Election Day, as it is normally. Second, that the election manipulation by Democrats happening before our very eyes was unprecedented. So, with the Presidency hanging in the balance, we decided to take immediate, necessary action, rallying freedom-loving Americans in all key swing states. We intend to send a clear message to those in power: we will protect the vote and stop Democrats from stealing this election. In concert with many other conservative organizations including FreedomWorks, Act! For America, Turning Point Action and many others, we are working to Protect the Vote. (more added each day). For immediate updates, make sure to . Would you be interested in? | Half of President Donald Trump’s posts on Facebook and Twitter have been censored by Big Tech giants in the wake of Tuesday’s still-contested election. | As the election continues and the legal battles begin, please encourage anyone that has evidence or a firsthand account of suspicious activity to. From the Trump lawyers: “Whether it’s ballots cast by the deceased, incorrect online voter status, or illicit ballot harvesting, we have a legal team investigating every rumor and testimonial.” | One of the nation’s best-known pollsters called out news networks that rushed to declare an Arizona victory for Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden. | President Donald Trump tweeted Wednesday morning that it’s “very strange” how his lead in Electoral College battleground states started to “disappear” overnight. | See about the initial Protect the Vote rallies held: “As an organization deeply committed to the rule of law and the integrity of the election system, Tea Party Patriots Action is working with FreedomWorks, Turning Points, Heritage, and countless social media influencers to help organize and assemble citizens in various locations around the country to voice our support for transparent and honest ballot counting. While Election Day has passed, the integrity of the count is essential. It is imperative that every legally cast ballot be counted, and that any voter fraud be opposed. In order for Americans to trust the election process, we must ensure that there are clearly defined laws surrounding our elections, and that those laws will be faithfully and consistently enforced. We are coming together today and in future days to show our support for the Constitution, the rule of law, and election integrity. Fair and honest elections are an essential pillar of a free society.” | Hundreds of pro-President Donald Trump protesters gathering outside of the Maricopa County Recorder’s Office on Wednesday night and could be heard chanting “count those votes.” | Attorney Rudy Giuliani traveled to Philadelphia, alleging “massive cheating” as more votes are counted in the battleground state Wednesday. | |

body:
We need to hit the ground running.

**BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY**

Friend,

We're officially heading into a runoff, and **we need to hit the ground running. This race will decide the Senate Majority **

First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:_that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life._

It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Friend.

**But, this fight isn 't over yet, Friend.** We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress.

From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and **we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state.**

The future of Georgia―and the United States―depends on this runoff election, and I know I can count on principled conservatives like you, Friend, to protect Georgia from the radical socialist agenda. **We are the** **last line of defense against Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Socialist Jon Ossoff. **
_**We have been MASSIVELY outspent throughout this race, and we will be again if we don't have your IMMEDIATE support. **_

body:
This needs your urgent attention

Dear Friend,

I know it's been a crazy couple of days, but I couldn't not reach out to you today.

Republican David Perdue's race in Georgia has gone to a RUNOFF, and _**he is counting on our immediate support in order to defeat his radical, socialist opponent.**_

name: Young Kim
subject: Still counting votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

I wish I had better news, %%First Name%%, but this fight is far from over.

I wish I had better news, Friend, but this fight is far from over.

Polls closed 3 days ago and there are STILL thousands of votes to be counted.

[**Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $25 to our recount fund right now to push us over the top?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VVboslkUJHiJS0KwL3dfQWAENhZ65chqNZINAQuWllkXZpzj5PQ-7oF3dljB1SkQR5TVXRxfypAFt0eqniHxY0DihvX-FBugGmX3U0CD2ZYQd_QzGVyLaWQLBnAax6stFNUFz1u16LMgSankbuBeqfNAwRTJRXRJGuCRqW6WeXW6B711ycCXlyN8l7_PaZ44Vm80TMa7NpHZyjHMkiMkUDOUHPIgsT-TXmU-a-tEYniPzljIn2hEP_pm4kc3RPvHdp_6FCabvvK0ThhMRGT9AQjOfOL8SkMrLE8T8ZoDXgmPPzESEEkPhlXuoXGSpuFp4m898QLMnK33X8w40MqyXEa88ZBTZMpSQGKTtCFvJ9rwyeFEpDn-VHlT2NB1xosAI11TQdKSrjR9n1alIkH0lRi4s20B3Ql2iQMNR0MPzcg=&c=FCqxwcIZQF6REjRx2yy1ttjjEQqNoT_iHgNtksKhvjw7-AwJEUcU-Q==&ch=xmAz85BZwToUpN_vtmjIEnjo6qxkK60NESE69m3TfuOBvPJmEuAdLg==)

When we started this just two years ago, we set out with a mission: to restore common-sense leadership to Congress, give conservative Californians a voice, and get this country back on track.

We accomplished _so much more_. We've run a grassroots operation proving we have the support of California behind us. On March 3rd -- the night of the Primary -- we shocked the nation by defeating our incumbent, Far Left opponent.

We are inches from the finish line. [**Can you chip into the Recount Fund today? We won 't be able to flip this top-targeted seat without your support.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VVboslkUJHiJS0KwL3dfQWAENhZ65chqNZINAQuWllkXZpzj5PQ-7oF3dljB1SkQR5TVXRxfypAFt0eqniHxY0DihvX-FBugGmX3U0CD2ZYQd_QzGVyLaWQLBnAax6stFNUFz1u16LMgSankbuBeqfNAwRTJRXRJGuCRqW6WeXW6B711ycCXlyN8l7_PaZ44Vm80TMa7NpHZyjHMkiMkUDOUHPIgsT-TXmU-a-tEYniPzljIn2hEP_pm4kc3RPvHdp_6FCabvvK0ThhMRGT9AQjOfOL8SkMrLE8T8ZoDXgmPPzESEEkPhlXuoXGSpuFp4m898QLMnK33X8w40MqyXEa88ZBTZMpSQGKTtCFvJ9rwyeFEpDn-VHlT2NB1xosAI11TQdKSrjR9n1alIkH0lRi4s20B3Ql2iQMNR0MPzcg=&c=FCqxwcIZQF6REjRx2yy1ttjjEQqNoT_iHgNtksKhvjw7-AwJEUcU-Q==&ch=xmAz85BZwToUpN_vtmjIEnjo6qxkK60NESE69m3TfuOBvPJmEuAdLg==)

Thank you,

Young Kim

For the 2020 Federal election cycle, a candidate committee may raise up to $2,800 from an individual, up to $5,000 from a Federal multicandidate PAC, and up to $2,800 from a Federal non-multicandidate PAC.

Committee may not accept funds for its recount efforts from corporations or labor unions, Federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, or any non-federal committees. Donations to our recount fund will not be aggregated with contributions from the general election.

body:
We need to hit the ground running.

**BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY**

Friend,

We're officially heading into a runoff, and **we need to hit the ground running.[ This race will decide the Senate Majority](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NIdLo-CsnO_SrHqXHeiozKmewTLx30OdLMnRH1kSkjXzgKHajRD_v7b5YQtqlUbAJ6_eCQXomKhrsFBUKR8hD2YryYa1yi0rByY-6Dc-T17Oe7b75HEPFywJ2NPPA23eUwfDIFbee6aUJak18834sIHApL-7KThxOcSAU75VO5iXcG_e8ieNKQAwwYGxKqhwFUCXxHZ-NAKlQvaWqAs4yxdX_kMlWJxTv5PPbwfvAxE6--vCWWiEMUhUYPnHBHu27uFuklSRfE8Zf1yEM6GufcNyvkpZH2O4LD8SSCxBWmhP4T05LlVnSlzQzebCDKB-v5dz9bl0C2KlCDhzG0milU80MxmoXPwlx7MmRsw7MIq9jHkSisQdpR1DtwwqkHKdUVWGGhsW-RH9Fo5Uci5X_g==&c=PhoihjILMvf7OUaRKusMw_GvK9O5RFsf-tn0HrmKH0hARMtXvAb4yw==&ch=d5xS28xGGefkWtx5h9adcV-C-81yIdlwUUe-iw7-hb1D7Ba92aciTQ==)**

First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:_that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life._

It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Friend.

**But, this fight isn 't over yet, Friend.** We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress.

From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and **we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state.**

The future of Georgia―and the United States―depends on this runoff election, and I know I can count on principled conservatives like you, Friend, to protect Georgia from the radical socialist agenda. **We are the** **last line of defense against Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Socialist Jon Ossoff. **
_**We have been MASSIVELY outspent throughout this race, and we will be again if we don't have your IMMEDIATE support. **_

clean_body: We need to hit the ground running. BREAKING: GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTION TO DECIDE SENATE MAJORITY Friend, We're officially heading into a runoff, and we need to hit the ground running.== First, I want to thank you for all the support leading up to this moment. Georgia's election results proved that conservatives across Georgia are behind us and our commitment to change the direction of this country for the better. After months of desperate attacks from my opponent and his special interest allies, conservative voters still turned out in force to send a message to the liberal Democrats:that you stand with me, and together we will protect our Georgia values and way of life. It has been a long, hard fight, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart for being on the frontlines with me, Friend. But, this fight isn 't over yet, Friend. We have one last chance to SAVE the Republican Senate Majority and Georgia is our final line of defense against complete Democrat control of the US Congress. From here on out, all eyes will be on Georgia, and we must stand together to show that radical liberals cannot take over our great state. The future of Georgia―and the United States―depends on this runoff election, and I know I can count on principled conservatives like you, Friend, to protect Georgia from the radical socialist agenda. We are the last line of defense against Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and Socialist Jon Ossoff. We have been MASSIVELY outspent throughout this race, and we will be again if we don't have your IMMEDIATE support. == == == == == == You--and all of my team's supporters--have been working hard since the start of this campaign, and haven't let up for a moment. We've got until January 5th in this leg of the race, and we need to put 100% of our energy and resources into defeating Jon Ossoff. We cannot allow the Left to steal this seat and gain control of the Senate, destroying our great nation and everything it stands for. We need to show every left-wing special interest donor that we will not let them hand over Georgia to the liberal mob. I refuse to sit by and let Georgia become ground zero for the Socialist movement, with higher taxes and defunded police departments. I am counting on your support to protect the state we know and love. == The future of Georgia will be determined on January 5th. You have a choice between Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and Jon Ossoff's radical Socialist agenda and our America First agenda. == Thank you for all your support thus far. Let's finish this fight and keep Georgia red. Thank you, David Perdue == Paid for by Perdue for Senate Perdue for Senate, Inc. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

body:
Friends, From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Without your support, this wouldn’t have been possible.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=396A583A1A7982)

| | Friends,

From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Without your support, this wouldn’t have been possible.

While there’s still more votes to be counted, we feel confident in our victory and, I want to thank each and every one of you for your commitment and support throughout my campaign.

Despite being outspent by my opponent and dark money PACs who sought to buy this election, Staten Island and Southern Brooklyn didn’t back down and made their voices heard.

In Congress, I will be the conservative voice representing NYC and push back on the radical policies of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, hold Mayor de Blasio accountable and stand up for Staten Island and Southern Brooklyn.

Sincerely,

---

| | Nicole Malliotakis

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: ALERT: Show up to state capitols Saturday, November 7th: Stop the Steal!
body:
| |
---
|
---
I know that watching the Democrats and the media collude to steal this election in broad daylight is infuriating. It’s upsetting, demoralizing, terrifying, and makes me want to scream.

But please understand me clearly: **WE MUST NOT GIVE UP THE FIGHT.**

If this were a normal election, and the President had lost fair and square, that would be different. This is not normal, however. What is happening is not normal.

The Democrats told America their plans for months. Strange how it’s playing out exactly as they said it would.

And so, because we are not in normal times, we must fight back. No matter who the corrupt media declares to be the winner, and no matter how many times Joe Biden claims victory, until every court case brought by President Trump’s legal team is settled and the counts are clearly finished in a legal manner – THIS FIGHT IS NOT OVER!

**So, do whatever you can to show up at your state capitol at noon, local time, tomorrow, Saturday, November 7th.**

Unlike the left, we won’t burn buildings to ground, but we will use our God-given rights to gather peaceably, show our President we support his efforts to have a fair election, and that we will not roll over and accept this fraudulent, third-world country-style election.

Share this with everyone you know and GET TO YOUR CAPITOL TOMORROW!!

God Bless America,

Jenny Beth Martin

| | Friend - Georgians have cast their votes in record numbers. It is time to make sure every single eligible ballot is counted! If you voted on a provisional ballot on Election Day, and NOT on a voting machine, **you may need to take additional action (called "curing") to make sure your vote counts by 5:00 PM TODAY.** Check to see if you need to take additional action by calling the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Our Fight, my fight is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Pennsylvania’s Seventh Congressional District does not belong to a party, it
belongs to the hard working people who call this beautiful district home.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

November 6, 2020

Contact: Alex Meyer

Alex@schellerforcongress.com <mailto:Alex@schellerforcongress.com >

Our Fight, my fight is not over

Pennsylvania’s Seventh Congressional District does not belong to a party, it
belongs to the hard working people who call this beautiful district home. While
we wait for all of the remaining ballots to be counted, one thing is clear:
every legal vote matters, and every legal vote must be verified.

I have learned one main thing during this journey, Pennsylvanians reject
socialism and they reject west coast values being brought to our great
district. Susan Wild must be held accountable for how she votes in Congress. I
look forward to being a large part of that conversation.

This fight to defend the American Dream, our fight, my fight is not over, it
has only just begun.

###

Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

This has been a remarkable year and I am humbled by the support our campaign
received from people like you. Our campaign was powered by the countless hours
of hard work from our fantastic volunteers. They say politics is a team sport
and it was an honor to have your support and dedication.

Winning the Republican nomination in this district was among the greatest
honors in my life. CD-7 is a special district, with special people and while we
worked hard towards a different outcome, my commitment to Houston and to
service has not changed one bit.

I promise to continue working to preserve the values and way of life in
Houston. Now, more than ever, it is vital that we fight to keep Houston the
Energy Capitol of the World, support our men and women in law enforcement and
build a better future for our children.

Thank you for your continued support and friendship.

Sincerely,
Wesley

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=cc6489950c0441508a62e3bb889139ee&_t=WEyUzwmSJaS2UZ93hLvOpWCPD57jsoP-E4ReRCsebuPyg-mU16OpxiOjOi4jO6ikwnW0Z1YygBctgYO1LlcXvSkgGHN3FHuFfPKCFM0HK1qClFQkXM6hWvq36xGUA6QuVSE8B2s4nUgPArQqoKoou9lNmhTuYRy4ymMgnrmDdb4%3D>
.

Peter,

Our work to defend Kelly’s conservative leadership in Washington is far from over – in fact, we’re just getting started!

**Kelly is going head-to-head in the runoff election against radical liberal Raphael Warnock, and the entire radical Left is prepared to leave it all on the table to turn Georgia Blue.**

All eyes are on Georgia right now.

The votes that are cast across Georgia on January 5, 2021 will decide everything from the future of the Republican Senate Majority to the future of our entire economy. We need to go all-out to keep the Senate in Republican hands.

They’re stepping up and pooling their resources together to send him to the Senate, because they know that if he wins he’s going to return the favor by fighting for their progressive, un-American agenda.

**Here’s who Kelly has in her corner in this fight:**

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: I’m asking you to pray.
body:
| | Peter, Our nation needs your prayers. Political division, frustration, and anticipations are rising as Americans continue to wait for election results. **It can be tempting to feel helpless during this time, but you have a mighty weapon you must deploy - prayer.** Join with us and thousands of Christians across the country as we unite together in prayer for the election results and for our nation. Romans 12:12 says, “Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer.” We’ve created a prayer guide specifically for this important time in our country. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2w8Vd6Fwr-uoADAXvE4YhPO8IPugfZTfu3EnTq36dKRWA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201106com01&n=1) I encourage you to [share this prayer guide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2w8Vd6Fwr-uoADAXvE4YhPO8IPugfZTfu3EnTq36dKRWA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201106com01&n=2) with others. Prayer is powerful. You have a vital role to play. Together let’s unite our prayers to see the Gospel spread, truth protected, and God honored in the public square. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201106com01&n=3)
---

| | | | | |

| Friend,
We did it! On Tuesday, the voters of Georgia sent a resounding message to the status quo, the Radical Left, and The Swamp - that we need a political outsider and a businesswoman with a record of results in the U.S. Senate. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you so much for your support. This [victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7AuGRKBGlbfgJrzDKKx3xhlg3U7oPTfIiZBpybYRT4ElA0WWLufcPkErUqlBK6u0__Ynaci9OIjZAoSRU6wLdFKhO7mhwmDyTcPkLmmut4X0sn5UWm2c0yTQ-o4f8UQ9MlfDnrx2GMwrPbJZVqq7FTKSo7quJt2R246anjnomqXz&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==) would not have been possible without the hard work and dedication of each and every single one of Kelly's supporters. It is time to unite the Party and move forward for a strong win on January 5th.
View some of Kelly's favorite [pictures](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7AuGRKBGlbfg7wN4ES7QXk_84W0eXxi5pTih3K8jvLIsOZvXddkFbQFyacfzO_Tji3dxYD22Gl5h7oeed5ZkV-4q0nxo40JUOOlTHKe7VAZWsiOVoM8fjCImDq8ZG_VP9MBG8-5O6ya4FCE05KuK8Lix-D-Rs4o_Ulv_TjHxWRSR&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==) from her Election Night party below:

| While we celebrate our win on Tuesday, let's remember this race is far from over. Kelly's campaign is now heading to a January 5th runoff against radical Democrat Raphael Warnock, and it will determine whether or not Republicans retain their majority in the United States Senate.
Because of the high stakes, Kelly's seat is now the #1 target for radical Democrats trying to win control of the U.S. Senate, and they're already making a nation-wide push to try and take it. They know that if they win this seat on January 5th, they'll have a rubber stamp to pass their radical agenda of socialized medicine, massive tax increases, open borders, defunding the police, and the Green New Deal. Kelly's seat is America's last line of defense against the radical Left - and it'll take everything we've got to keep this state red and preserve the American Dream for all Georgians.
Right now, the best way you can help is by [donating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7DSWCiMKua-a7AToofHBr7SBTM2LDHSVJbS645segDEV6NoQPuMTmtbxZtQ1WagDlvUas1r1hFAqXBeiH7M8qI8yz4JNAv0n3prvp4QbFiaATU-j9MTxHtuwKg-jkt0z3MOQs4ExWz_L&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==) to Kelly's campaign - whether it's $25, $10, or $5 - so that we can keep up with the millions in out-of-state funding that Chuck Schumer and other radical liberals are already pouring into Raphael Warnock's campaign.
---
| | | [DONATE TO KELLY TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7DSWCiMKua-a7AToofHBr7SBTM2LDHSVJbS645segDEV6NoQPuMTmtbxZtQ1WagDlvUas1r1hFAqXBeiH7M8qI8yz4JNAv0n3prvp4QbFiaATU-j9MTxHtuwKg-jkt0z3MOQs4ExWz_L&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==)

| Please also consider [volunteering](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7Cfy-7Iu8KttRItXcf2YlWq9ks6Y5wRFhEFgoZ6QvbHhzd9Ld5MfYu13JJLXqb6lnvLzKn5Q02u0v8YSisCgKu8pw_V0STBkhrXakPHGREjPGYBgEZUB_7I=&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==) to help us get across the finish line - because in a race this close, every single call, text, and yard sign will count on Election Day.
---
| | | [VOLUNTEER FOR KELLY TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7Cfy-7Iu8KttRItXcf2YlWq9ks6Y5wRFhEFgoZ6QvbHhzd9Ld5MfYu13JJLXqb6lnvLzKn5Q02u0v8YSisCgKu8pw_V0STBkhrXakPHGREjPGYBgEZUB_7I=&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==)

| Meanwhile, Kelly is also standing with President Trump to ensure that every legal vote is counted and that the Democrats do not silence the voices and votes of millions of Americans. In fact, Kelly recently [donated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7AuGRKBGlbfgwDHUb5DSETasxU4GlW8YI0G8Ank8JE81vH1i4dWDdKTzqj8AKisxdScpVzxIimSTxmaFKchYjkhNGZeBeHVmsL-vzAhW6ZWU4SnK9VEizg0AJhmcJdXCgk6ydJXCO8HCXfQ6rCaQtaKoUGQQ463pXTbPMyFyU4KiIS9iX8dg6G5UY7aiZbgPkJXc1zBDOP8drjBsS9ptDc0=&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==) to the President's [recount fund](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A3FWcPNRf51N0w4TI-0QdAhXYQS4IiFWmSEBVB8tDRy-iMSx-7wO7AuGRKBGlbfgQQdZQvUOimkVZcsasOIp9h75RoWyHbSOxBzNg41j8hh89Z20moK1dHVA9_OqTOdi3UJdpJgzXoKm41vJEhuRAyCZJIXVJyDrDNk-o_jpSg_qrg4yEqQafw==&c=Wnm50G8N455vrDddZLW09Coq22Hw80HHFZayavMQrLKCH8E6YkrvKA==&ch=RpG3ArJm8kfAJU6OPYOPUoSHtELvIchErtTiScbk2_uMo8kohBMw8g==). name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: this election is not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
🚨 CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES 🚨
The election is not over - Georgia's Senate seat is
heading to a runoff!

ACT NOW TO HOLD GEORGIA FOR REPUBLICANS

Hey Peter - it's Senator Kelly Loeffler.

Right now, we don't yet know who will occupy the
White House in 2021.
Those votes have been cast. We can't change the
result of that election - all we can do now is make sure those
votes are fairly and properly counted.
But there is one place where conservatives can act
now to make an impact on our nation's future: the Senate.
Because there's one Senate seat still hanging in the
balance: Georgia's.
Georgia will decide the balance of the Senate - and
it's why I'm writing to you today.
I need your help to win the runoff election and
solidify the Republican majority in the Senate.

CHIP IN TO HOLD THE SENATE

But the race in Georgia is about more than just the
balance of power in Washington. It's about differing visions for
America's future.

If my opponent Raphael Warnock wins this election by
"flipping" Georgia, he will be the new darling of the Left - and
that will be disastrous for America.
The media will claim his victory in a red state
means that there is a broad mandate for his policy platform. Here
are just a few of his far-left positions:

Thinks abortion on demand is a "human right" and
believes it should be funded by taxpayers
Calls police officers "thugs", "gangsters", and
"bullies" - and has publicly advocated against our police forces
for years
Is 100% on board with the radical leftist agenda of
national Democrats

Does this sound like someone who should be Georgia's
next Senator to you?
We can't let a radical leftist like Raphael Warnock
represent Georgia.

ACT NOW - STOP RADICAL LEFTIST RAPHAEL WARNOCK

It's why I can't give up - and why I'll keep fighting
for Georgians. Let me tell you - I couldn't be more different
from Raphael Warnock and his radical liberal allies.

I'm not a politician. I'm a businesswoman and a
conservative who has spent my life in the real world, getting
real results.

I often mention that I grew up on a farm because
farm life teaches you things it's hard to learn anywhere else.

By age 10, I was working in the fields and punching
a time clock. If you haven't done it yourself, let me tell you:
it's no walk in the park - it's all blinding summer heat, hacking
out weeds, and sore muscles.

On a farm, nothing is guaranteed. Only when you get
pushed to the brink do you know what you are capable of doing.

I loved the farm, and it made me who I am. But I had
big dreams. I packed my bags and left the farm to head to
college.

It didn't come easy. I waited tables to make ends
meet. And we had to take risks - including mortgaging my family's
land to help me earn an MBA.

Maybe I was a little less polished or had fewer
connections, than most of my classmates in business school when I
arrived. But they weren't farm kids - so I had to work harder.
It's what I knew how to do.

That's the mindset I brought to nearly three decades
in business, too. By the time I got the call from Governor Kemp
to serve in the Senate, I had started businesses, created
hundreds of jobs, and sat on the board of community organizations
all over Georgia.

I walked away from my life as a businesswoman to
serve my fellow Georgians. And I've brought that same farm-girl
attitude to Washington.

I came to Washington to shake up the status quo, and
I've worked hard to get results for Georgians.

During my short time in office, I have:

fought to defend the unborn
stood up to the Chinese Communist Party
rushed relief to those who are struggling as a
result of the COVID-19 crisis
worked overtime to reignite and restore our economy
fought for President Trump's Keep America Great
Agenda

I'll never stop working for you and I'll never let
the establishment beat me - it's not in my DNA to give in.

SEND KELLY BACK TO WASHINGTON

The Georgia runoff election will take place on
January 5, 2021. That gives me some extra time to connect with
Georgia voters - but it also means running a high-stakes
statewide campaign for two extra months.
We need your help to stay competitive in this race.
National liberal dollars are FLOODING into our state. They
desperately want to say they flipped Georgia - that they have
broken the "red wall" of conservatives in the South. Please,
donate to our campaign today:
https://secure.winred.com/georgians-for-kelly/action-1687388/

Thank you for your support,

Senator Kelly Loeffler

Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

The maximum allowable contribution per individual to
Georgians for Kelly Loeffler is $5,600 ($2,800 for the general
and $2,800 designated for a potential general run-off election).A
couple may contribute up to $11,200 ($5,600 for the general and
$5,600 designated for a potential general run-off election) if
drawn on a joint account and if this form is completed and signed
by both contributors.Federal Multi candidate PAC's may contribute
$5,000 per election.Federal law requires that Georgians for Kelly
Loeffler use best efforts to report the name, mailing address,
occupation and name of employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election
cycle.Contributions to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler are not
deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax
purposes.Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals who

government contractors are prohibited. Contributions are subject

We can't change the result of that election - all we can do now is make sure those votes are fairly and properly counted. body:

Friend, **WE DID IT!** We brought our message of strong economic recovery and prosperity to the voters of Western New York, and they responded by overwhelmingly putting their trust in me again this election. I want to thank the voters of Western New York for their trust and reiterate my commitment to each of you that I will fight for you and our region in Congress. This was a long campaign, and there certainly have been many changes and obstacles, but my mission to fight for Western New York has not changed. I want to take a moment to also thank every single supporter and volunteer who put in long hours of hard work to make this victory happen; we couldn't have done this without you - I am deeply grateful. It has been the honor of my life to represent our region these past three months and I look forward to a full term in Congress. It's time to get back to work! Sincerely, Chris Jacobs

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Making history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As we close out the week, I can't help but reflect on this election as another historic year for your Indiana Republican Party. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=adaade5d4f)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Making History_**
As we close out the week, I can't help but reflect on this election as another historic year for your Indiana Republican Party. **Governor Holcomb** and **Lt. Governor Crouch** made history with the all-time Indiana record for votes cast in a governor's race...and they matched the largest margin of victory in a governor's race in modern history. Right at 7 p.m. as the polls closed, the race was called.

Every year as a party we think that we've hit our high-water mark -- perhaps in 2016 when **President Trump** and **Vice President Pence **won Indiana by 20 points, in 2018 when **now-Senator Mike Braun** defeated Joe Donnelly, or in 2019 when we elected an all-time high number of Republican mayors.

But in 2020, together we shattered the records again.

On Tuesday, Indiana was once again the first state on the board for the Trump-Pence ticket.

Democrats thought for sure they had a shot at the attorney general's office or the Fifth District congressional seat, but **Attorney General-elect Todd Rokita** and **Congresswoman-elect Victoria Spartz** proved them wrong.

We protected our supermajority in the Indiana Senate and grew that supermajority in the Indiana House by four seats. And across the state, we won countywide offices at an all-time record level, which is a true credit to our hardworking county chairs across the state.

Together, we simply weren't tired of winning. Across the state and up and down the ballot, we put in the work, and it's reflected in the results.

Indiana has long been a leader in conducting elections in a manner where all Hoosiers can have confidence in the results – and that once again happened this year.

As for the race for president, I, and many others over the past few days, have been stunned by the endless stream of ballot issues, irregularities and claims from other states. We are a country of laws and to have a free and fair election those laws must be followed. I fully support the president and vice president utilizing all legal means at their disposal to ensure that the 2020 election results are above reproach and that each and every legal vote has been counted.

Thank you to everyone who helped us make history this week. This one's for you, and for Hoosiers across our state who want a government that gives them results.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:** _**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer **__introduced **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** and **Governor Eric Holcomb** before they delivered their acceptance speeches on Tuesday night. _
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_We Did It!_** On Tuesday,**Eric Holcomb** officially was reelected as Indiana’s governor. And he didn’t just win – he won with the most votes ever received by a gubernatorial candidate in Indiana history and matched the largest margin of victory in modern history. The race was called right at 7 p.m. Eastern as the polls officially closed in Indiana, showing the overwhelming support Hoosiers showed for Governor Holcomb statewide.

The victory speech – [which you should watch in its entirely here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9aadd529fe&e=1acd9bb3d6) – wrapped up another busy week for **Governor Holcomb** , as he traveled through the state talking with Hoosiers, with stops just in the last week meeting with folks at the Cone Place in Kokomo (corn dogs!), Fair Oaks Farms (milkshakes!), the Martinsville Candy Company (candy canes!), and Schimpff’s Confectionery (red hots!). _**“Around here in Indiana, we don't just dream big thing. We do big things and we aspire to be a positive influence all along the way.”**_ Now that the results in Indiana are in, let’s follow Governor Holcomb’s lead and get busy continuing to build One Indiana for All!
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Republicans Win Big**_

Check out this infographic detailing our big Indiana Republican wins statewide!
---
|
---
| |
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[November 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64821a06b&e=1acd9bb3d6): IFRW Women's Suffrage Centennial Tea Celebration
_Have an event to add? Please email it to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[made his case for four more years](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2b0db877d9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[gave acceptance speech on election night](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12e9905ebc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young**[is bringing transparency to organ donation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07deaaad0c&e=1acd9bb3d6)[s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2494548c43&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun**[discusses importance of primary care health for rural Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=78946cffbb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** _[t](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2d0eced38&e=1acd9bb3d6)_[ _hanks Hoosiers for the opportunity to serve_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=45dbfb5d59&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[demands investigations into anti-Catholic crimes](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e092ba9c86&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird**[wins his first re-election race](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f22fc3f1c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[met with postal workers to thank them for their work](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58e3c985a7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence**[thanks Hoosiers for being re-elected](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d20a0e0c4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[releases statement on](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e18dd984f2&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ commitment to defeat the virus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9f01ba3901&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth** [_is re-elected to serve a third term_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5ff488620&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---

Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc.101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200Indianapolis, IN 46204
[Add us to your address book](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70b6cdf951&e=1acd9bb3d6&c=adaade5d4f).

subject: URGENT: NH Senate Democrats already trying to overturn election results!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:

---

| |

| Friends, **This is an urgent request. ** It's been less than 72 hours since New Hampshire voted to return the State Senate to a Republican majority and **the Democrats are already trying to overturn the results**! They have requested THREE recounts in districts that they lost by significant margins and have no realistic chance of overturning the results. In fact, in one district in which they have requested a recount, the Republican Senator won by nearly 900 votes! We need your help -- the recount process is expensive and we need the funds to make sure that it is done appropriately and fairly. [Can you help us by donating $5, $25 or even $100 to our "Recount Defense Fund?" Secure link to donate online here.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ4NzkxMTI2NDk0ODExNDE4JmM9dDdjNiZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDg2MzkwODUmZD1nN24zdThi.EwVoHWhnZYiYfh_zloCSJJngfPvsp5Nl9d2JeE6cEHQ) Read the statement by Senator Jeb Bradley:
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| "It’s sad that Democrats are needlessly exposing many state employees and volunteers to Covid-19 as they pursue Senate recounts that will not change the outcome of the election given the margins of victory by Republicans in all three of the recounts.
These three recounts are nothing but a frivolous political ploy that ignores the very clear message from hard working voters that they truly don’t want an income tax or a sales tax. Apparently Democrats don’t want to accept this."
---
---
| |
---
| New Hampshire overwhelmingly voted for a Republican Majority, now we need to defend the will of the voters. Please consider making a small donation if you able.

Thank you,
The New Hampshire Senate Republicans

Democrats and their leftist allies have thrown open the spending spigot, flooding our state with liberal campaign cash to flip this seat. **[It’s all hands on deck to ELECT KELLY LOEFFLER on January 5th!](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=c5ce738b4b034606b1f14d6e5c1a8609&_e=3W8WiZgAIHjBJNnfsupeYbPKnUP8ABH6oQb3Ukw2LUvDpxhm6g4dxdcevKYoXx5NTWfiLsACHIA9-3g5A0xQyS6k6OgjteBfOBW31i0A1RMeFLDEmS9drw-SQx8pQ1nhO4xx0KsxKXibNSLYEDRDV6g3aXvnhcObkN2QeitxR8BdF_HW5ULYb3Hva7XMJJYI5X5U5bBAW-7oOoJf7acFydnGypGKiaQRyYBEFEQ-4PH2v0o7EKrGjybS7PkZLWxr1Uh4urOod6DUZE3YkEBNrH2Num6xD9ooAF4lQh9OBOoTa0fz3b4fbv1Q94ZiLViNG1a8LZXnW9NKK7UGEiY_os8arHoqdoAl48niWBXOY3HBPn4dZ2BT1FpqasE0ljyDiANCZZuArdliYCE8VGrF9-s20gqfoxMXXGI1GBqsehKN8L-3Nn61lFdGwHP6GiYP4r1Uz9RS56rv6KeoWuF7Xg%3D%3D)** If we learned anything this year, it’s that outorganizing and outworking the Democrats is our key to victory. clean_body: Georgia’s Senate Seat could determine if we keep the Senate majority! Hey Peter, Did you see the outcome in our U.S. Senate special election? Senator Kelly Loeffler surged ahead in the final weeks of the race to take the #2 spot in a crowded field. Now, she's locked in a head-to-head RUNOFF ELECTION against far-left Democrat Raphael Warnock. *** The U.S. Senate hangs in the balance, and ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA... The D.C. Democrats and their leftist allies have thrown open the spending spigot, flooding our state with liberal campaign cash to flip this seat. If we learned anything this year, it’s that outorganizing and outworking the Democrats is our key to victory. We can’t afford to have any conservative on the sidelines. That’s why I’m writing today, Peter. I’m urging EVERY Republican, in Georgia and across America, to join our efforts before it’s too late! Senator Loeffler, a conservative businesswoman and political outsider, has proven that she’s exactly the type of principled, tough, and determined leader we need fighting for Georgia and America. She’s unabashedly pro-life , pro-Second Amendment , pro-border wall , and pro-religious freedom. She’s fighting with all she’s got to stand up for our values and protect our liberty. Georgia is the front line now to stop the Democrats’ radical agenda. We need to fight with all we’ve got to win this runoff U.S. Senate election! Sincerely, Governor Brian Kemp | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Georgia United Victory Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Peter,
Krysty, our girls, and I want to thank everyone in New Mexico who supported our campaign this year. I was honored to run for the Senate, and I’m so proud of the truly enormous army of supporters we had throughout the state. We might not have gotten the outcome we wanted, but we certainly showed what a conservative campaign built on the support of the people of New Mexico can do.

So again, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support and prayers along the way. It meant the world to me and my family, and we absolutely couldn’t have done this without you.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Krysty, our girls, and I want to thank everyone in New Mexico who supported our campaign this year. I was honored to run for the Senate, and I’m so proud of the truly enormous army of supporters we had throughout the state. We might not have gotten the outcome we wanted, but we certainly showed what a conservative campaign built on the support of the people of New Mexico can do. So again, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all of your support and prayers along the way. It meant the world to me and my family, and we absolutely couldn’t have done this without you. Thank you! Mark | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =
